{# Custom override of sphinx_book_theme's components/author.html. The theme's default template runs the string "By" through Sphinx's built-in message catalog (`translate('By')`), which for the Korean locale produces the mistranslation "으로 " (a literal, out-of-context rendering of "by"). This override renders a clean, locale-appropriate footer credit instead: - Korean build: "작성자: " - Other builds: "By " #} {% if author %}

{% if language == 'ko' %} 작성자: {{ author }} {% else %} By {{ author }} {% endif %}

{% endif %}
